name: Ryou
description: The landlady of the apartment complex Jahy resides in. Her sister is the owner of the restaurant Jahy works at. She is ready to resort to violence in order to get her rent and, unlike her sister, is ready to throw Jahy on the streets at any moment. However, the landlady fears her sister, a fact that Jahy sometimes abuses.
mediaTitles: The Great Jahy Will Not Be Defeated!
The Great Jahy Will Not Be Defeated!

name: Sanya V. Litvyak
nativeName: サーニャ・V・リトヴャク
description: The single Witch out of the Orussia Empire at thirteen years old. Preferring to stay indoors during the day, Sanya has been described as "nocturnal." At times she is literally asleep on her feet, counting on Eila to move her around. Despite this somewhat limiting her contact with the other members of the 501st, her low profile makes her ideal for night missions and sneak attacks. Gains the ears and tail of a black cat with her Striker Unit equipped. Sanya's rank is Flying Officer and her origina
searchTerms: サーニャ・V・リトヴャク

name: Silver
description: As a child, Silver was kidnapped by the Masked Man along with several other children. There, he met and befriended a young girl named Blue. After spending several years being trained by the Masked Man, Blue led an operation for her and Silver to escape the Masked Man when his guard was down. After successfully managing to run away, the two began to work together to put an end to the Masked Man's ambitions. ~!Silver's special skill, as described by Dr. Yukinari Okido, is Pokémon trading (taught t

name: Subaru Akehoshi
description: __Unit:__ Trickstar __Club:__ Basketball Club An idol whose late-father was also an idol, and who wants to shine with his own brilliance. Outside his sunny, simple-minded deposition, Subaru's also very passionate. He adores anything that sparkles. With a singing voice that shines, his performances are bursting with energy. (Source: Ensemble Stars!! Wiki)
mediaTitles: Last Period: the journey to the end of the despair

name: Tomoko Shiretoko
description: Her Quirk allowed her to observe and monitor up to 100 people at a time, including their location and weak points.

name: Tsukushi Tsutsukakushi
description: Tsukushi is the president of the track and field club. She is also the older sister of Tsukiko. ~!She often bullies Youto, and is the person who made him to be known as Hentai Ouji. She wants to marry her little sister Tsukiko. She is the person who set up the cat statue. At first she jokingly tries to seduce him in an attempt to make her younger sister lose interest in him. But she also gradually starts to fall in love with him as well, going so far as to give him a really long-winded love conf

name: Tsumiki Fushiguro
description: ~! Megumi's older sister.!~ ~! Tsumiki was unknowingly chosen by Kenjaku to be a participant of the Culling Game and made into the incarnated host of Yorozu !~

name: Yuuto Ijika
description: __Height:__ 163 cm (5'4") The older brother of Benio Adashino. ~!Yuuto was also an old friend turned enemy of Rokuro Enmado, and the mastermind behind the Hiinatsuki Tragedy.!~

name: Chaozu
description: Chiaotzu is seemingly a small, doll-like human with plain white skin and red cheeks; his name is based off of the food jiaozi. When first introduced Chiaotzu is a student of the Crane Hermit (a rival of Master Roshi) and the constant companion of fellow student Tien; he quickly amends his ways though and joins Goku and his friends. While not outstanding in physical prowess compared to other superhuman warriors in Dragon Ball, Chiaotzu has considerable potency in psionics, especially in psychokin

name: Chikage Kazama
description: Member of the Bakumatsu, enemies of the Shinsengumi. He is the strongest Oni of the West and is after Chizuru, so that they can mate and create stronger Oni. His reasons for this are unknown, but his attempts to take Chizuru have so far been thwarted by the interference of the Shinsengumi. Despite being arrogant and cynical, he is not entirely cold-blooded, as he later saves Chizuru, although this might have been for his own purposes. Kazama is usually followed by his two demon companions Amagir

name: Cobra
description: Cobra's signature weapon is his Psycho-gun, a cybernetic arm-laser which is connected to his brain and capable of targeting enemies without needing a line-of-sight. This allows him to defeat most foes with ease, but some are not so vulnerable to the laser itself; the gun also drains Cobra's mental energies after extended use. For backup he carries an old-fashioned Magnum revolver. Buichi Terasawa created the main character based on the famous French actor Jean-Paul Belmondo. Cobra's facial featu

name: Ehwa Yeon
description: Ehwa Yeon, known by some as the "Yeon Family's Flare", is a member of the Yeon Family one of the 10 Great Families. She is a Regular climbing with the rest of her team, having recently participated in the Workshop Battle.

name: Gotou
description: The Zoldyck family manager. All contacts with the family members must go through him. An enigmatic and intimidating character, Killua once expressed to Gon his recurring nightmares of Gotou chasing him with a knife. He is also superb at the "where is the coin" trick. He cares for Killua as if he was his own son.

name: Hisone Amakasu
description: Hisone is a rookie pilot at Gifu base of Japan Air Self-Defense Force (JASDF). She is a very honest person who can never lie, and this leads her to hurt people unconsciously. Early in her career she encountered a dragon, Masotan, and was swallowed by him. This is how he chose Hiosone as his pilot. She gradually gets a thrill to fly with Masotan, and decides to live her life with the legendary dragon.
mediaTitles: Hisone to Maso-tan: Nao no Sora
searchTerms: Hisone to Maso-tan: Nao no Sora

name: Ju-Gyeong Lim
description: __Height:__ 169cm (5'6) Ju-Gyeong is the main protagonist of the story True Beauty. Through YouTube, she masters the art of makeup, changing her look completely. At school, she mains her "pretty girl" image by faking her personality, such as lying about her music preferences and eating small portions during lunch. At home, she sheds her image and revertts to her "geeky" self, spending her time reading comics, listening to rock music, and eating fatty foods like fried chicken. Later in the series

name: Junpei Murao
description: A 14 year old boy who took a liking to ballet since he was younger. He cut his aspirations short after his father, a stunt performer, passed away. Due to being the only male of his he took his uncle's advise to become more "masculine" to be a pillar of support to his family and quit ballet, instead practicing Jeet Kune Do under his tutelage. name: Juzo Okita
description: Captain of the Space Battleship Yamato.

name: Kengo Yozakura
description: __Affiliation:__ Yozakura Family __Occupation:__ Spy ~!__Blooming:__ Assimilate!~ The cheerfully mischievous fifth child of the family, who can craft hyperrealistic disguises.

name: Kenji Futakuchi
description: __Team:__ Datekougyou High School __Height:__ 184.2 cm According to Moniwa, Futakuchi is a problematic kouhai with a very easy going personality. He's often seen arguing with Kamasaki who is the ​complete opposite of Futakuchi.

name: Lindo Tachibana
description: __Height:__ 182 cm The brother of Ritsuka Tachibana. He is an exorcist at the same time he is a vampire who loves Ritsuka and will protect her even if it costs him his life. ~!In episode 9, he tells Ritsuka that they aren't sister and brother, but cousins. Lindo confesses his feelings for her.!~
